### Problem Description
patched placeholder

### Your Incorrect Code
```cpp
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
int n,q,x[200005],p[200005];
int sum[2000005];
int main(){
	cin>>n;
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
		cin>>x[i];
	}
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
		cin>>p[i];
	     sum[i]=sum[i-1]+p[i];
	}
	cin>>q;
	while(q--){
		int l,r;
		cin>>l>>r;
	    l=lower_bound(x+1,x+n+1,l)-x;
	    r=upper_bound(x+1,x+n+1,r)-x;
		//cout<<d<<' '<<c<<endl;
	   cout<<sum[r-1]-sum[l-1]<<endl;	
	}
}
```

### Failing Case #1
Input:
```
3
999969310 999972623 999984690
661601176 604313076 965275196
1
730002498 999997297

```
Your Output:
```
-2063777848

```
Expected Output:
```
2231189448

```
Error Analysis: Line 1: Got '-2063777848', Expected '2231189448'

### Your Task
Fix the C++ code to pass ALL test cases (including hidden ones).

### Critical Guidelines
1. Focus on algorithmic correctness - NO hard-coded values or special cases
2. Ensure proper data structures and complexity (aim for O(N log N) or better when possible)
3. Handle edge cases (empty input, single elements, max constraints)
4. Use standard C++20 features; avoid non-portable code

### Output Format
Provide ONLY the complete fixed C++ code in a single ```cpp block.
